# Separator

A visual separator between content sections (replaces Divider in Chakra v2).

## Import

```jsx
import { Separator } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| orientation | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `horizontal` | Separator orientation |
| variant | `"solid" \| "dashed" \| "dotted"` | `solid` | Visual style |

## Usage

```jsx
<VStack>
  <Text>Section 1</Text>
  <Separator />
  <Text>Section 2</Text>
</VStack>
```
